name: final
description: Creating a Node.js Server Application to expand our current Midterm project by conversion of CLI Application into a Node.js Server Application using Express.js. The goal is to make a transition of our work to make a backend server that interacts w/ our API by providing endpoints & capable to store search &selection histories in a MongoDB cloud Atlas instance in a database.
author: Kwane Galang, Alan Mai, Daniel Gomez, Nikole Cabrera, Marco Rodriguez
